mode_count_correction._note: Corrected 2026-07-06: qa_orbit_families_m9 was 9 (a qa_step bug fixed during the [198] Pudelko audit); true value is 5 (3 cosmos[24]+1 satellite[8]+1 singularity[1]). Both counts now numerically coincide with dft_frequency_pairs_m9=5; distinct_quantities remains true in the conceptual sense (different mathematical objects), not as a claim they differ in value.
